cohort 2026.5.10
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Add cohort artifacts to a plnr::Plan in bulk

Source: R/plan_integration.R
add_data_from_cohort.Rd

Bulk-ingest one or more cached artifacts from a CohortPipeline cohort into a plnr::Plan as named data entries. This replaces the typical nested for-loop that calls plan$add_data(name, direct = ...) once per (cohort, artifact) pair.

add_data_from_cohort(plan, cp, cohort, artifacts = NULL, prefix = "")

Arguments

plan

A plnr::Plan instance.

cp

A CohortPipeline instance.

cohort

Character. Name of the cohort to draw artifacts from.

artifacts

Character vector. Artifact names on cohort to register. Defaults to every artifact attached to that cohort.

prefix

Character. Prefix prepended to the data-entry name on the plan. Defaults to "". The full entry name is paste0(prefix, cohort, "__", artifact).

Value

The plan (invisibly), modified in place.

Details

For each artifact name supplied, the helper retrieves it from the specified cohort and registers it on the plan via plan$add_data(name, direct = ...). The data-entry name on the plan is composed as paste0(prefix, cohort, "__", artifact).

This function is the only point of contact between cohort and the plnr package. plnr is declared in Suggests, not Imports, so you must have it installed to use this helper.

See also

CohortPipeline

Examples

if (requireNamespace("plnr", quietly = TRUE) &&
    requireNamespace("data.table", quietly = TRUE)) {
  library(data.table)

  d <- data.table(id = 1:6, age = c(20, 30, 40, 50, 60, 70))
  cp <- CohortPipeline$new()
  cp$load(d)
  cp$exclude_and_track("root", "Under 30", "age < 30")

  cp$set_artifact("dt",
    from = "root",
    fn = function(dt, sib) dt
  )
  cp$set_artifact("n",
    from = "root",
    fn = function(dt, sib) nrow(dt)
  )

  plan <- plnr::Plan$new()
  add_data_from_cohort(plan, cp, cohort = "root")
  plan$get_data()
}
#> $root__dt
#>       id   age
#>    <int> <num>
#> 1:     2    30
#> 2:     3    40
#> 3:     4    50
#> 4:     5    60
#> 5:     6    70
#> 
#> $root__n
#> [1] 5
#> 
#> $hash
#> $hash$current
#> [1] "589728e8549b6bfeb972abdaa7167461"
#> 
#> $hash$current_elements
#> $hash$current_elements$root__dt
#> [1] "b975a11995bcec1f195a30ca1e408d0b"
#> 
#> $hash$current_elements$root__n
#> [1] "ab6c99bf411479e64ce0ac73146e687c"
#> 
#> 
#>
